text: The app keeps crashing when I try to open it. Hlp!

I would like to request a refund for an item I purchased. I received a different item than what I ordered, which is quite unacceptable. Additionally, my order was supposed to include two items, but I only received one. I expect to receive my money back for both discrepancies, not just store credit.
i was wondering does ur service support multiple languages? like, can i change the language settings in the app?
My order was supposed to arrive last week but still nothing. I can't believe this. It's really frustrating. Why is nobody responding to my messages?
I lost access to my account and can't recover it. Can you help me figure this out?
I’m trying to log in but the last name on my account is incorrect, and I can't change it in settings. Can you help me?

Hello, I'm experiencing an issue where the search results page loads fine, but it doesn't seem to apply any of the filters I've selected. I've tried this multiple times, and I'm using the latest version of Chrome. I've also cleared my cache, and yet the problem persists. Could you please assist me with this?
I've been trying to resolve an issue with the app not syncing for days now. It's incredibly frustrating. Can someone help?
I have been trying to understand if I can upgrade my plan without losing my current data. It's quite important for me, and I need to ensure nothing gets deleted in the process.

I'm frustrated because the app keeps crashing every time I try to upload a photo. This has been ongoing, and I really need a solution soon. It feels like there's been some sort of bug, but I can't get anyone to help me.

I purchased a jacket online, and when it arrived, it was completely damaged and not wearable. I'm really disappointed as it was meant for a special occasion. I would like a full refund, not a replacement, as I can't trust this store anymore.
Quick question, can someone explain what the difference is between the different subscription levels? I'm really trying to figure it out but there’s so much info on the site, it’s confusing!
I requested a refund for my last order since I returned the item but was charged again. Can you confirm this?

I would like to express my dissatisfaction with how my recent order was handled. Initially, I received a confirmation email stating that my package would arrive within three days. However, it arrived two weeks later, and I was not informed about any potential delays. To make matters worse, the item itself was not what I ordered. This is quite contradictory to the service I have come to expect from your company, and I hope you can address this issue promptly.
I can't log into my account after resetting the password. It keeps saying incorrect.

I am unable to access my account despite receiving confirmation that my credentials have been successfully updated. Additionally, I have received contradictory messages regarding my account status, which has left me unsure if there is an ongoing issue that I need to address. Can you clarify my current account standing?
I was promised a timely response, yet no one has contacted me for weeks. This is unacceptable.

I recently upgraded my account to access promised premium features, yet I find that they remain unavailable to me. This situation is quite frustrating and feels contradictory to what was advertised during the upgrade process. Could you please clarify why the features are still locked when I have already paid for the upgrade?
I received the wrong item and I need the right one, but it's been too long already.
I am encountering an issue where the app crashes upon startup. Please provide guidance on how to resolve this problem.

I am encountering a rather perplexing situation with my account that has left me quite frustrated. Despite successfully entering my login credentials, I am continually met with an error message indicating that my account is temporarily locked, which is perplexing as I have not attempted to log in multiple times. I would appreciate your assistance in resolving this issue at your earliest convenience, as I rely on accessing my account for important tasks.
I need to know how to update my payment info. Where do I go for that?
